title: AnomalyInstance
description: The specific duration in which the metric is flagged as anomalous.

allOf.description: The end time of the period during which the metric is flagged as anomalous. This is specified using the ISO 8601 format. For example, 2020-06-01T13:15:02.001Z represents 1 millisecond past June 1, 2020 1:15:02 PM UTC.
The universally unique identifier (UUID) of an instance of an anomaly in a metric.

The start time of the period during which the metric is flagged as anomalous. This is specified using the ISO 8601 format. For example, 2020-06-01T13:15:02.001Z represents 1 millisecond past June 1, 2020 1:15:02 PM UTC.
Feedback type on a specific instance of anomaly submitted by the user.
